mapper.insert: INSERT INTO skill_version (skill_id, version, changelog, resource_url) VALUES (#{skillId}, #{version}, #{changelog}, #{resourceUrl})
mapper.select: SELECT id, skill_id, version, changelog, resource_url, created_at FROM skill_version WHERE skill_id = #{skillId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT id, skill_id, version, changelog, resource_url, created_at FROM skill_version WHERE skill_id = #{skillId} ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
